phrases.intent_en: Ask for tickets to the foundation
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais deux billets pour la Fondation Vasarely, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH duh bee-YEH poor lah fohn-dah-SYOHN vah-zah-reh-LEE, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The Fondation Vasarely was designed by the artist himself and opened in 1976. Its distinctive hexagonal building made up of black-and-white geometric modules is itself a Vasarely artwork. It is located on the Jas de Bouffan estate west of the city centre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kohn puh PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lehn-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Many museums in France allow photography without flash. The Fondation Vasarely's large-scale works are particularly photogenic.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide available
phrases.cultural_note: The foundation offers guided tours in French and English on selected days. The permanent collection features 44 monumental works arranged in hexagonal cells, creating an immersive environment unlike any conventional museum.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a student discount
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un tarif réduit pour les étudiants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn tah-REEF ray-DWEE poor lay zay-too-DYAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Most French museums offer reduced rates for students (under 26 with valid ID) and free entry for under-18s.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get there from the city centre
phrases.text_local: Comment se rendre à la Fondation depuis le centre-ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN suh RAHN-druh ah lah fohn-dah-SYOHN duh-PWEE luh SAHN-truh veel
phrases.cultural_note: The Fondation Vasarely is about 2 km west of the Cours Mirabeau, accessible by bus or a 25-minute walk. It is near the Jas de Bouffan district, which also has historical connections to Cézanne whose family owned the estate.
